title: The cuts are coming! But how many and how fast?
section_path: The cuts are coming! But how many and how fast?
section_path_text: The cuts are coming! But how many and how fast?
summary:
Main
The three things investors should know this week:
The Fed has confirmed it will be cutting rates soon. The question is now only how quickly. Markets are pricing in 4-5 cuts this year with a possibility of a double (0.5%) cut in September.
